title: Seamless-field figure-eight Formation Flight Observatory

presentationGeometry.leaderAndFollower: two independently phased copies of the locked Deetjen OB F03 measured-derived complete dove surface sequence
presentationGeometry.loopClosure: 14 ms velocity-matched cubic Hermite presentation closure
presentationGeometry.flowSpatialFilter: mask-aware separable Gaussian radius 4 sigma 2 with hidden solid-gap fill from surrounding fluid samples; presentation-only
presentationGeometry.flowOpacity: joint normalized vorticity and absolute vertical-velocity signal with 0.025 minimum displayed signal opacity
presentationGeometry.flowVisibility: all 48 encoded phases render the filtered full-opacity presentation of the adjacent real archived c20 fields; neither temporal nor spatial presentation transforms enter solver results
presentationGeometry.wakeBridge: three age-colored ridges are reconstructed from archived c20 vorticity and vertical velocity; cyan is young wake, violet is old wake
presentationGeometry.wakeBridgeLuminance: normalized leader q5 reflected-population exchange from every sample of the passed 4,820-step c18 focused trace
presentationGeometry.wakeIntersectionMarker: presentation-phase ring at the follower plane; a visual locator, not solver geometry or a measured vortex boundary
presentationGeometry.cameraComposition: spherical figure-eight around the dual-dove wake bridge
presentationGeometry.evidenceBoundary: body is measured-processed; left wing is measured-outline-derived and gap-filled; right wing is a documented bilateral-reflection assumption; tail is derived from the measured processed surface
presentationGeometry.forceBearingGeometry: the archived c20 CFD and loads remain the Li-Nabawy prescribed-wing canonical; the dove surfaces do not replace solver geometry
presentationGeometry.presentationOnlyParts: both complete dove surfaces, wingtip guides, temporal and spatial field display transforms, wake ridges, intersection ring, and camera path are presentation-only and never enter voxelization, fluid stepping, load accounting, or reported power

output.loopMode: forward-only seamless loop; no reversed frames

predecessor.description: exact V8 figure-eight binary retained before suppressing the hidden canonical solid-gap and low-signal display seam

claimBoundary: The figure-eight camera and all field transforms are presentation-only. A mask-aware Gaussian display filter suppresses lattice-scale blockiness, and hidden canonical solid cells are filled only for visual continuity from surrounding archived fluid samples; those filled pixels are not fluid measurements. Joint vorticity and vertical-velocity opacity removes the misleading dark low-vorticity seam. The original c20 arrays are unchanged and remain the only CFD evidence. The dual Deetjen dove surfaces remain measured-derived presentation replays and do not replace prescribed-wing CFD, voxelization, loads, or power. Failed c16-to-c20 force convergence still blocks quantitative formation benefit and biological claims.
